rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Conditionally Seal Documents Related To Plaintiffs Opposition To Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment And Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 24 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION, SHAO YAN CHEN, HAN LIN LIU, ZHI HUA MO, YUK YEE CHENG, HUI ZHEN HU, JIN QING ZHAO, RUIZHAO WU, QI WU Motion To Conditionally Seal Documents Related To Plaintiffs Opposition To Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment And Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Adjudication continued to June 4, 2020. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ADEENA BROWN VS. CRYSTAL WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Karzi Equities, Ltd.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for MAR. 24 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT KARZI EQUITIES, LTD's Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action Lis Pendens GRANTED. Lis Pendens is expunged. No opposition filed. Attorney's fees and costs granted in the amount of $1,522.50 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Proposed order to be submitted by e-filing and a courtesy copy delivered to department 501 (preferably by mail). If the tentative ruling is contested, parties are to appear by telephone. Telephone appearances must be arranged through Court Call by calling 1-888-88-COURT. No prior notice or permission is required.= (501/CFH)
